requirement_topic.en: State-Utility Interconnection in FSM — 120/240 V 60 Hz, NEMA-System, and State-by-State Process
requirement_topic.zh: FSM州级并网——120/240 V 60 Hz、NEMA体系与分州流程
requirement_topic.zht: FSM州級併網——120/240 V 60 Hz、NEMA體系與分州流程

summary.en: FSM is a US-linked 60 Hz island-market model with common service conditions at 120/240 V and a state-based utility structure. Interconnection for BESS must be cleared with the relevant state public utility corporation (such as Pohnpei Utilities Corporation and Chuuk Public Utility Corporation) and reviewed against project-specific DRD oversight. The critical technical mismatch is that the FSM power context is 120/240 V 60 Hz, versus China’s 220/380 V 50 Hz; PCS hardware, relay logic, protection thresholds, ride-through behavior, reconnection timing, and grid-connection firmware must therefore be revalidated per US-aligned standards for each project. IEEE 1547 and UL 1741 are the expected interconnection references in most FSM project reviews, even where state procedures are still evolving.
summary.zh: FSM是一个与美国衔接的60 Hz海岛市场，常见供电条件为120/240 V，并由州级公用事业架构治理。BESS并网必须经相关州公用事业公司（如波奈佩公共事业公司、楚克公共事业公司）审核，并由DRD进行项目监督。关键技术差异在于FSM电网为120/240 V、60 Hz，而中国为220/380 V、50 Hz，因此PCS硬件、继电器逻辑、保护阈值、穿越行为、重连延迟和并网固件都须按美国体系标准按项目重新验证。IEEE 1547与UL 1741在多数FSM项目审查中仍是预期并网参考，尽管州级流程尚在成熟中。
summary.zht: FSM為一個與美國接軌之60 Hz海島市場，常見供電條件為120/240 V，並由州級公用事業架構治理。BESS併網必須經相關州公共事業公司（如波奈佩公共事業公司、楚克公共事業公司）審核，並由DRD進行項目監督。關鍵技術差異在於FSM電網為120/240 V、60 Hz，而中國為220/380 V、50 Hz，因此PCS硬件、繼電器邏輯、保護閾值、穿越行為、重連延遲和併網韌體都須依美國體系標準按項目重新驗證。IEEE 1547與UL 1741在多數FSM項目審查中仍是預期併網參考，儘管州級流程仍在成熟中。

standards_or_laws: DRD — Department of Resources and Development energy and infrastructure coordination role; verify current published requirements for interconnection
Pohnpei Utilities Corporation — state project interconnection and service-change requirements
Chuuk Public Utility Corporation — state project interconnection and service-change requirements
IEEE 1547 — Standard for Interconnection and Interoperability of Distributed Energy Resources with Associated Electric Power Systems Interfaces (expected in US-aligned BESS interconnection projects)
UL 1741 — Inverters, converters, controllers and interconnection-system equipment for use with distributed energy resources

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence for BESS commonly relies on GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2017, validated for China’s 50 Hz, 220/380 V conditions. Exporters should not assume those test settings map to FSM’s state-utility 60 Hz market.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网证据通常依赖GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2017，且基于中国220/380 V、50 Hz条件。出口商不应假设该测试设置可直接映射至FSM州级公用事业的60 Hz市场。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網證據通常依賴GB/T 36558-2023及GB/T 34120-2017，且基於中國220/380 V、50 Hz條件。出口商不應假設該測試設定可直接映射至FSM州級公共事業之60 Hz市場。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap is fundamental: voltage and frequency are both non-matching, and FSM interconnection is state-driven. Even where one utility site has a 120/240 V arrangement, another site may require transformer or grounding assumptions in a different configuration. Chinese documentation should be screened for each target state utility, then PCS and protection retuning should be done before BESS commissioning approval. Without revalidation in the FSM 60 Hz context, any 50 Hz China validation is insufficient.
gap.zh: 差距是基础性的：电压和频率都不匹配，而且FSM并网由州级公用事业主导。即使某些项目站点采用120/240 V结构，另一些站点也可能因变压器或接地方式存在不同配置。中国文件应按目标州公用事业逐个筛查，再对PCS和保护进行重调后方可通过FSM BESS并网许可。未经过FSM 60 Hz情景重验证的中国50 Hz文件不足以用于项目。
gap.zht: 差距為根本性：電壓和頻率皆不匹配，且FSM併網由州級公共事業主導。即便某些項目站點採用120/240 V結構，另一些站點因變壓器或接地方式也可能有不同配置。中國文件應按目標州公共事業逐一篩查，再對PCS與保護進行重調後，方可通過FSM BESS併網許可。未經FSM 60 Hz情景重新驗證的中國50 Hz文件不足以用於項目。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — interconnection approval and permit compliance with the relevant state utility is required for all grid-connected BESS in FSM; DRD technical confirmation is required for project filing
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic evidence is not enough for FSM state-utility interconnection and permitting

source.publisher: Pohnpei Utilities Corporation / Chuuk Public Utility Corporation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat FSM as a 60 Hz, state-utility interconnection market: 50 Hz China interconnection evidence is not automatically transferable. Verify the exact target utility, interconnection form, and DRD filing requirements before procurement and commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将FSM视为60 Hz、州级公用事业并网市场：中国50 Hz并网证据不具自动转移性。采购和并网前应核实目标州公司、并网形式和DRD报备要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將FSM視為60 Hz、州級公共事業併網市場：中國50 Hz併網證據不能自動轉移。採購與併網前應核實目標州公司、併網形式及DRD報備要求。
